title: coleus verticillatus
intro: Coleus verticillatus, also known as the painted nettle or the red-ringed nettle, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In herbal preparations, Coleus verticillatus is often used as an infusion or tincture, and can also be applied topically in the form of a salve or oil.
